items.briefing:
Attackers are continuing to steal data from Salesforce accounts through a compromised third-party app called Klue, meaning any Australian organisation using Salesforce should check which third-party apps have access to their account and remove anything unfamiliar or unnecessary. Separately, a new survey highlights that while Australian healthcare organisations are spending more on cybersecurity, many still lack confidence in their ability to recover after an attack — a reminder that having a tested backup and recovery plan is just as important as prevention.

**Practical tip:** Review the third-party apps connected to your Salesforce account today — go to Settings and remove any apps your organisation no longer uses or doesn't recognise.

featured.title: Mackay Sugar cyber attack flagged as broader risk to Australia’s food supply chain
featured.quote: Critical infrastructure attack on major Australian sugar exporter highlights food supply chain vulnerability.
